provenance.source: Uses redacted adjacent-turn answer shapes to keep connective language natural while preserving the answer, reason, and caveat structure.

messages.text: Use ASA. What matters: it handles UV and heat well. Keep this boundary in view: dry it before printing.

cases.answer:
Answer: Use ASA for the bracket.

This is why: it handles UV and heat better outdoors.

You should also consider: use enough walls and dry the filament.

messages.text: What material should I use outdoors?

cases.answer:
Answer: Use ASA outdoors.

This is why: it handles UV and heat better.

You should also consider: use enough walls.
